code: import{format}from'date-fns';export var ClassroomColumns=[{Header:'ID',accessor:'id',disableFilters:true},{Header:'Subject Course',accessor:'subjectName'},{Header:'Instructor',accessor:'instructor'},{Header:'Year & Section',accessor:'yearSection'},{Header:'Date Created',accessor:'dateCreated',Cell:function Cell(_ref){var value=_ref.value;return format(new Date(value),'dd/MM/yyyy h/m a');}}];
